description_long: This is a classic, high-backed armchair upholstered in rich, dark brown leather with a deep button-tufted pattern covering both the seat and backrest. The armrests are thick, rounded, and fully padded, seamlessly integrated into the chair's structure for maximum comfort. The leather surface shows signs of wear and patina, giving it a vintage, well-used appearance. The backrest is tall and slightly winged, providing ample support and a sense of enclosure. The base of the chair is solid and boxy, with no visible legs, suggesting a sturdy and grounded construction. The overall design exudes a sense of luxury and timelessness, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A vintage, dark brown leather armchair with deep button-tufted upholstery, thick padded armrests, and a high, winged backrest. The surface shows wear, adding character and a sense of history.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded armrest and the depth of the seat cushion, with visible wear on the leather.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the deep button-tufted pattern on the seat and backrest, as well as the symmetrical, rounded armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and seat depth, with the same worn leather texture visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, slightly curved back with minimal detailing and no visible legs.
attribute_armrest_design: thick, rounded, padded and upholstered in leather
attribute_backrest_style: high, winged, button-tufted, and slightly curved
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs, solid box base
